    // Get translation for current FC
    function t(key) {
        const fcCode = getFCCode();
        const lang = (LANGUAGES_CONFIG && LANGUAGES_CONFIG[fcCode]) || 'EN';
        return (TRANSLATIONS[lang] && TRANSLATIONS[lang][key]) || TRANSLATIONS.EN[key] || key;
    }

    // Load configuration from JSON file
    function loadConfig() {
        return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
            if (SESAME_CONFIG) {
                resolve(SESAME_CONFIG);
                return;
            }

            GM_xmlhttpRequest({
                method: 'GET',
                url: CONFIG_URL,
                onload: function (response) {
                    try {
                        SESAME_CONFIG = JSON.parse(response.responseText);
                        console.log('[Sesame Driver] Config loaded successfully:', Object.keys(SESAME_CONFIG).length - 1, 'FCs');
                        resolve(SESAME_CONFIG);
                    } catch (error) {
                        console.error('[Sesame Driver] Failed to parse config:', error);
                        reject(error);
                    }
                },
                onerror: function (error) {
                    console.error('[Sesame Driver] Failed to load config:', error);
                    reject(error);
                }
            });
        });
    }

    // Load branded tractors list from SharePoint
    function loadBrandedTractors() {
        return new Promise((resolve) => {
            if (BRANDED_TRACTORS) {
                resolve(BRANDED_TRACTORS);
                return;
            }

            console.log('[Sesame Driver] Loading branded tractors from Wiki:', BRANDED_TRACTORS_URL);
            GM_xmlhttpRequest({
                method: 'GET',
                url: BRANDED_TRACTORS_URL,
                anonymous: false,
                headers: { 'Accept': 'application/json' },
                onload: function (response) {
                    console.log('[Sesame Driver] Branded tractors response status:', response.status);
                    try {
                        const page = JSON.parse(response.responseText);
                        // Wiki stores JSON as page content string
                        const data = JSON.parse(page.content);
                        // Store as a Set for fast lookup
                        BRANDED_TRACTORS = new Set(data.licensePlates.map(p => p.toUpperCase()));
                        console.log('[Sesame Driver] Branded tractors loaded:', BRANDED_TRACTORS.size, 'plates');
                        resolve(BRANDED_TRACTORS);
                    } catch (error) {
                        console.error('[Sesame Driver] Failed to parse branded tractors:', error);
                        console.log('[Sesame Driver] Response text (first 200 chars):', response.responseText.substring(0, 200));
                        BRANDED_TRACTORS = new Set();
                        resolve(BRANDED_TRACTORS);
                    }
                },
                onerror: function (error) {
                    console.error('[Sesame Driver] Failed to load branded tractors:', error);
                    BRANDED_TRACTORS = new Set();
                    resolve(BRANDED_TRACTORS);
                },
                ontimeout: function () {
                    console.error('[Sesame Driver] Branded tractors request timed out');
                    BRANDED_TRACTORS = new Set();
                    resolve(BRANDED_TRACTORS);
                }
            });
        });
    }

    // Load languages config from SharePoint
    function loadLanguagesConfig() {
        return new Promise((resolve) => {
            if (LANGUAGES_CONFIG) {
                resolve(LANGUAGES_CONFIG);
                return;
            }

            GM_xmlhttpRequest({
                method: 'GET',
                url: LANGUAGES_URL,
                onload: function (response) {
                    try {
                        LANGUAGES_CONFIG = JSON.parse(response.responseText);
                        console.log('[Sesame Driver] Languages config loaded:', Object.keys(LANGUAGES_CONFIG).length, 'FCs');
                        resolve(LANGUAGES_CONFIG);
                    } catch (error) {
                        console.error('[Sesame Driver] Failed to parse languages config:', error);
                        LANGUAGES_CONFIG = {};
                        resolve(LANGUAGES_CONFIG);
                    }
                },
                onerror: function () {
                    console.error('[Sesame Driver] Failed to load languages config');
                    LANGUAGES_CONFIG = {};
                    resolve(LANGUAGES_CONFIG);
                }
            });
        });
    }

    // Extract tractor license plate from instance
    function extractTractorPlate(instance) {
        const plateEl = instance.querySelector('[data-testid="licensePlateNumber"]');
        if (plateEl) {
            const plate = plateEl.textContent.trim().toUpperCase();
            console.log('[Sesame Driver] Extracted tractor plate:', plate);
            return plate;
        }
        console.log('[Sesame Driver] No tractor plate found in instance');
        return null;
    }

    // Non-VRID load types that don't require Check ID
    const NON_VRID_TYPES = [
        'EMPTY_PICKUP',
        'NON_INVENTORY',
        'MAINTENANCE',
        'OTHER',
        'EMPTY_DROP'
    ];

    // Handle Check ID button click
    function handleCheckID(vrid, buttonElement, instance) {
        console.log('[Sesame Driver] handleCheckID called with VRID:', vrid);

        // Auto-detect if tractor is Amazon owned
        const tractorPlate = extractTractorPlate(instance);

        loadBrandedTractors().then(brandedSet => {
            if (tractorPlate && brandedSet.has(tractorPlate)) {
                // Amazon tractor detected automatically
                console.log('[Sesame Driver] Amazon tractor auto-detected:', tractorPlate);
                unlockCheckIn(instance);
                showSuccessMessage(t('amazonTractorDetected').replace('{plate}', tractorPlate));
            } else if (tractorPlate) {
                console.log('[Sesame Driver] Tractor plate not on branded list, asking user:', tractorPlate);
                showTractorModal((confirmed) => {
                    if (confirmed === true) {
                        unlockCheckIn(instance);
                        showSuccessMessage(t('amazonTractorConfirmed'));
                    } else if (confirmed === false) {
                        fetchDriverInfoForVerification(vrid, buttonElement, instance);
                    }
                });
            } else {
                console.log('[Sesame Driver] No tractor plate found, proceeding with driver verification');
                fetchDriverInfoForVerification(vrid, buttonElement, instance);
            }
        });
    }

    // Get FC code from page
    function getFCCode() {
        // Method 1: Look for FC code next to email in header (most reliable)
        const boldSpans = document.querySelectorAll('.a-text-bold');
        for (let span of boldSpans) {
            const text = span.textContent.trim();
            const match = text.match(/^-\s*([A-Z]{3,4}\d)$/);
            if (match) {
                const fcCode = match[1].toUpperCase();
                console.log('[Sesame Driver] FC code detected from header:', fcCode);
                return fcCode;
            }
        }

        // Method 2: Check URL for FC code pattern
        const url = window.location.href;
        const urlMatch = url.match(/node[=/]([A-Z]{3,4}\d)/i);
        if (urlMatch) {
            const fcCode = urlMatch[1].toUpperCase();
            console.log('[Sesame Driver] FC code detected from URL:', fcCode);
            return fcCode;
        }

        // Method 3: Look for FC code in page elements
        const fcElements = document.querySelectorAll('[data-testid*="node"], [title*="node"]');
        for (let elem of fcElements) {
            const text = elem.textContent || elem.getAttribute('title') || '';
            const match = text.match(/([A-Z]{3,4}\d)/);
            if (match) {
                const fcCode = match[1].toUpperCase();
                console.log('[Sesame Driver] FC code detected from element:', fcCode);
                return fcCode;
            }
        }

        // Method 4: Search in header section specifically
        const header = document.querySelector('#header, [id*="header"]');
        if (header) {
            const headerMatch = header.textContent.match(/\b([A-Z]{3,4}\d)\b/);
            if (headerMatch) {
                const fcCode = headerMatch[1].toUpperCase();
                console.log('[Sesame Driver] FC code detected from header section:', fcCode);
                return fcCode;
            }
        }

        console.log('[Sesame Driver] Could not detect FC code, using DEFAULT');
        return 'DEFAULT';
    }

    // Get Slack webhook for current FC
    function getSlackWebhook() {
        const fcCode = getFCCode();
        console.log('[Sesame Driver] Detected FC code:', fcCode);

        if (SESAME_CONFIG && SESAME_CONFIG[fcCode]) {
            console.log('[Sesame Driver] Using webhook for FC:', SESAME_CONFIG[fcCode].name);
            return SESAME_CONFIG[fcCode].webhook;
        }

        console.log('[Sesame Driver] FC not found in config, no webhook available');
        return null;
    }

    // Get user login (email without @amazon.com)
    function getUserLogin() {
        const emailElement = document.querySelector('.a-color-secondary.a-text-bold');
        if (emailElement) {
            const email = emailElement.textContent.trim();
            // Remove @amazon.com if present
            return email.replace('@amazon.com', '');
        }
        return 'Unknown';
    }

    // Send Slack message for escalation
    function sendSlackMessage(vrid, carrier, reason, otherDetails) {
        const SLACK_WEBHOOK = getSlackWebhook();
        const fcCode = getFCCode();

        // If no webhook configured for this FC, don't send message
        if (!SLACK_WEBHOOK) {
            console.log('[Sesame Driver] No webhook configured for FC:', fcCode, '- Slack message not sent');
            return;
        }

        // Translate reason to English
        const reasonTranslations = {
            'name_mismatch': 'Driver name does not match',
            'photo_mismatch': 'Driver picture does not match',
            'both_mismatch': 'Driver name and picture do not match',
            'no_relay_app': 'Driver does not have Relay App',
            'other': otherDetails ? `Other: ${otherDetails}` : 'Other'
        };

        const englishReason = reasonTranslations[reason] || reason;

        const userLogin = getUserLogin();
        const message = `VRID: ${vrid}\nCarrier: ${carrier}\nEscalation Reason: ${englishReason}\nReported by: ${userLogin}`;

        console.log('[Sesame Driver] Sending Slack message to FC:', fcCode);
        console.log('[Sesame Driver] Message:', message);

        const payload = {
            "Content": message
        };

        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: 'POST',
            url: SLACK_WEBHOOK,
            headers: {
                'Content-Type': 'application/json'
            },
            data: JSON.stringify(payload),
            onload: function (response) {
                console.log('[Sesame Driver] Slack message sent successfully:', response.status, response.responseText);
            },
            onerror: function (error) {
                console.error('[Sesame Driver] Failed to send Slack message:', error);
            }
        });
    }

    // Open River workflow page and pass action via URL hash
    function openRiverWorkflow(carrier, vrid, reason, otherDetails) {
        const riverUrlTemplate = SESAME_CONFIG && SESAME_CONFIG.riverWorkflowUrl;
        if (!riverUrlTemplate) {
            console.log('[Sesame Driver] No River workflow URL configured');
            return;
        }
        const fcCode = getFCCode();
        const riverUrl = riverUrlTemplate.replace('{FC}', fcCode);
        let hash = 'sesame_action=check_yes';
        if (carrier) hash += '&sesame_carrier=' + encodeURIComponent(carrier);
        if (vrid) hash += '&sesame_vrid=' + encodeURIComponent(vrid);
        if (fcCode) hash += '&sesame_fc=' + encodeURIComponent(fcCode);
        if (reason) hash += '&sesame_reason=' + encodeURIComponent(reason);
        if (otherDetails) hash += '&sesame_other=' + encodeURIComponent(otherDetails);
        const webhook = getSlackWebhook();
        if (webhook) hash += '&sesame_webhook=' + encodeURIComponent(webhook);
        const userLogin = getUserLogin();
        if (userLogin) hash += '&sesame_user=' + encodeURIComponent(userLogin);
        const url = riverUrl + (riverUrl.includes('#') ? '&' : '#') + hash;
        console.log('[Sesame Driver] Opening River workflow:', url);
        GM_openInTab(url, { active: false });
    }

    // River page handler: if we're on River and the hash contains our action, auto-check the radio button
    function handleRiverPage() {
        if (!window.location.hostname.includes('river.amazon.com')) return;
        if (!window.location.hash.includes('sesame_action=check_yes')) return;

        console.log('[Sesame Driver] River page detected with sesame action, starting auto-fill sequence...');

        // Parse data from hash
        const hashParams = {};
        window.location.hash.replace('#', '').split('&').forEach(param => {
            const [key, value] = param.split('=');
            if (key && value) hashParams[key] = decodeURIComponent(value);
        });
        const carrier = hashParams['sesame_carrier'] || '';
        const vrid = hashParams['sesame_vrid'] || '';
        const fcCode = hashParams['sesame_fc'] || '';
        const reason = hashParams['sesame_reason'] || '';
        const otherDetails = hashParams['sesame_other'] || '';
        const webhook = hashParams['sesame_webhook'] || '';
        const userLogin = hashParams['sesame_user'] || '';

        // Map Sesame reason codes to River dropdown values
        const reasonMap = {
            'name_mismatch': 'Driver name does not match',
            'photo_mismatch': 'Driver picture does not match',
            'both_mismatch': 'Driver name and picture do not match',
            'no_relay_app': 'Driver does not have Relay App',
            'other': 'Other'
        };
        const riverReason = reasonMap[reason] || '';

        // Helper: wait for an element to appear in the DOM
        function waitForElement(selector, maxAttempts = 30, interval = 1000) {
            return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
                let attempts = 0;
                const timer = setInterval(() => {
                    attempts++;
                    const el = document.querySelector(selector);
                    if (el) {
                        clearInterval(timer);
                        resolve(el);
                    } else if (attempts >= maxAttempts) {
                        clearInterval(timer);
                        reject(new Error('Element not found: ' + selector));
                    }
                }, interval);
            });
        }

        // Helper: dynamically find a River form element by its nearby label text.
        // River uses auto-generated IDs (textinput2174, dropdown2132...) that change on workflow updates.
        // Instead, we find the visible label on the page and grab the closest form field by position.
        function waitForFieldByLabel(labelText, fieldType = 'input', maxAttempts = 30, interval = 1000) {
            const fieldSelectors = {
                'input': 'input[type="text"]',
                'select': 'select',
                'textarea': 'textarea'
            };
            const fieldSelector = fieldSelectors[fieldType] || fieldType;

            return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
                let attempts = 0;
                const timer = setInterval(() => {
                    attempts++;

                    // Find all text elements that could be labels
                    const allElements = document.querySelectorAll('span, label, div, p, b, strong, td');
                    let labelEl = null;
                    for (const el of allElements) {
                        const directText = Array.from(el.childNodes)
                            .filter(n => n.nodeType === Node.TEXT_NODE)
                            .map(n => n.textContent.trim())
                            .join(' ');
                        const normalizedDirect = directText.trim();
                        const normalizedLabel = labelText.trim();
                        // Exact match (case-insensitive), or for longer labels allow partial match
                        if (normalizedDirect.toLowerCase() === normalizedLabel.toLowerCase() ||
                            (normalizedLabel.length > 4 && normalizedDirect.toLowerCase().includes(normalizedLabel.toLowerCase()))) {
                            labelEl = el;
                            break;
                        }
                    }

                    if (labelEl) {
                        // Get the label's bounding box position
                        const labelRect = labelEl.getBoundingClientRect();
                        const labelCenterX = labelRect.left + labelRect.width / 2;
                        const labelBottom = labelRect.bottom;

                        // Find ALL matching form fields on the page
                        const fields = document.querySelectorAll(fieldSelector);
                        let closestField = null;
                        let closestDistance = Infinity;

                        for (const field of fields) {
                            const fieldRect = field.getBoundingClientRect();
                            // Only consider fields that are below or at the same level as the label
                            if (fieldRect.top < labelRect.top - 50) continue;
                            // Calculate distance: prefer fields directly below and horizontally aligned
                            const dx = (fieldRect.left + fieldRect.width / 2) - labelCenterX;
                            const dy = fieldRect.top - labelBottom;
                            const distance = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
                            if (distance < closestDistance) {
                                closestDistance = distance;
                                closestField = field;
                            }
                        }

                        if (closestField) {
                            clearInterval(timer);
                            console.log(`[Sesame Driver] Found field by label "${labelText}": ${closestField.getAttribute('ng-model') || closestField.name} (distance: ${closestDistance.toFixed(0)}px)`);
                            resolve(closestField);
                            return;
                        }
                    }

                    if (attempts >= maxAttempts) {
                        clearInterval(timer);
                        reject(new Error(`Field not found by label "${labelText}" (type: ${fieldType})`));
                    }
                }, interval);
            });
        }

        // Helper: click a radio button and trigger Angular change detection
        function clickRadio(radio) {
            radio.click();
            radio.checked = true;
            radio.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true }));
            radio.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true }));
        }

        // Helper: click the Next button
        function clickNext() {
            const buttons = document.querySelectorAll('button[type="submit"]');
            for (const btn of buttons) {
                const span = btn.querySelector('span[awsui-button-region="text"]');
                if (span && span.textContent.trim() === 'Next') {
                    btn.click();
                    console.log('[Sesame Driver] Clicked Next button');
                    return true;
                }
            }
            console.log('[Sesame Driver] Next button not found');
            return false;
        }

        // Step 1: Check "Yes" radio button
        waitForElement('input[type="radio"][value="Yes"][name="myGroupId_I"]')
            .then(radio => {
                clickRadio(radio);
                console.log('[Sesame Driver] Step 1: Checked "Yes"');
                // Small delay before clicking Next
                return new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 500));
            })
            // Step 2: Click first Next
            .then(() => {
                clickNext();
                return new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 1500));
            })
            // Step 3: Check "Driver ID Execution Checks Feedback Request" radio
            .then(() => {
                return waitForElement('input[type="radio"][value="Driver ID Execution Checks Feedback Request"]');
            })
            .then(radio => {
                clickRadio(radio);
                console.log('[Sesame Driver] Step 3: Checked "Driver ID Execution Checks Feedback Request"');
                return new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 500));
            })
            // Step 4: Click second Next
            .then(() => {
                clickNext();
                console.log('[Sesame Driver] Step 4: Clicked second Next');
                return new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 1500));
            })
            // Step 5: Fill SCAC field with carrier
            .then(() => {
                if (!carrier) {
                    console.log('[Sesame Driver] Step 5: No carrier data, skipping SCAC fill');
                    return;
                }
                return waitForFieldByLabel('SCAC', 'input'); // Find SCAC field by its label
            })
            .then(input => {
                if (input && carrier) {
                    input.focus();
                    input.value = carrier;
                    input.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true }));
                    input.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true }));
                    console.log('[Sesame Driver] Step 5: Filled SCAC with carrier:', carrier);
                }
            })
            // Step 6: Click Next after SCAC
            .then(() => {
                return new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 500));
            })
            .then(() => {
                clickNext();
                console.log('[Sesame Driver] Step 6: Clicked Next after SCAC');
                return new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 1500));
            })
            // Step 7: Fill Site (FC code) - find by label
            .then(() => {
                return waitForFieldByLabel('Site', 'input');
            })
            .then(input => {
                if (input && fcCode) {
                    input.focus();
                    input.value = fcCode;
                    input.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true }));
                    input.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true }));
                    console.log('[Sesame Driver] Step 7: Filled Site with:', fcCode);
                }
            })
            // Step 8: Fill VRID - find by label
            .then(() => {
                return waitForFieldByLabel('VRID', 'input');
            })
            .then(vridInput => {
                if (vridInput && vrid) {
                    vridInput.focus();
                    vridInput.value = vrid;
                    vridInput.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true }));
                    vridInput.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true }));
                    console.log('[Sesame Driver] Step 8: Filled VRID with:', vrid);
                }
            })
            // Step 9: Select "No" in dropdown
            .then(() => {
                // Wait a bit more for the dropdown to render
                return new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 1000));
            })
            .then(() => {
                return waitForFieldByLabel('Was Driver Rejected?', 'select');
            })
            .then(dropdown => {
                // Find the "No" option and select it via selectedIndex
                const options = dropdown.querySelectorAll('option');
                for (let i = 0; i < options.length; i++) {
                    if (options[i].value === 'No') {
                        dropdown.selectedIndex = i;
                        break;
                    }
                }
                // Trigger all relevant events for Angular to pick up the change
                dropdown.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true }));
                dropdown.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true }));
                dropdown.dispatchEvent(new Event('blur', { bubbles: true }));
                console.log('[Sesame Driver] Step 9: Selected "No" in dropdown');
            })
            // Step 10: Select escalation reason
            .then(() => {
                if (!riverReason) {
                    console.log('[Sesame Driver] Step 10: No reason provided, skipping');
                    return;
                }
                return waitForFieldByLabel('Escalation Reason', 'select');
            })
            .then(dropdown => {
                if (dropdown && riverReason) {
                    const options = dropdown.querySelectorAll('option');
                    for (let i = 0; i < options.length; i++) {
                        if (options[i].value === riverReason) {
                            dropdown.selectedIndex = i;
                            break;
                        }
                    }
                    dropdown.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true }));
                    dropdown.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true }));
                    dropdown.dispatchEvent(new Event('blur', { bubbles: true }));
                    console.log('[Sesame Driver] Step 10: Selected reason:', riverReason);
                }
            })
            // Step 11: Click Next after reason
            .then(() => {
                return new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 500));
            })
            .then(() => {
                clickNext();
                console.log('[Sesame Driver] Step 11: Clicked Next after reason');
                return new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 1500));
            })
            // Step 12: If "Other", fill the textarea with details, then always click Next
            .then(async () => {
                if (reason === 'other' && otherDetails) {
                    const textarea = await waitForFieldByLabel('More Details', 'textarea'); // "Other" details textarea
                    textarea.focus();
                    textarea.value = otherDetails;
                    textarea.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true }));
                    textarea.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true }));
                    console.log('[Sesame Driver] Step 12: Filled other reason details');
                    await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 500));
                } else {
                    await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 500));
                }
            })
            // Step 13: Click Next
            .then(() => {
                clickNext();
                console.log('[Sesame Driver] Step 13: Clicked Next after details page');
                return new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 1500));
            })
            // Step 14: Click final Next
            .then(() => {
                clickNext();
                console.log('[Sesame Driver] Step 14: Clicked final Next');
                return new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 2000));
            })
            // Step 15: Get the issue link and send it to Slack
            .then(() => {
                return waitForElement('a#viewIssue', 30, 1000);
            })
            .then(link => {
                const issueUrl = link.href;
                console.log('[Sesame Driver] Step 15: Issue created:', issueUrl);

                if (webhook && issueUrl) {
                    // Build the same escalation reason format as the original Slack message
                    const reasonTranslations = {
                        'name_mismatch': 'Driver name does not match',
                        'photo_mismatch': 'Driver picture does not match',
                        'both_mismatch': 'Driver name and picture do not match',
                        'no_relay_app': 'Driver does not have Relay App',
                        'other': otherDetails ? `Other: ${otherDetails}` : 'Other'
                    };
                    const englishReason = reasonTranslations[reason] || reason;

                    const message = `VRID: ${vrid}\nCarrier: ${carrier}\nEscalation Reason: ${englishReason}\nReported by: ${userLogin}\nSIM: ${issueUrl}`;
                    GM_xmlhttpRequest({
                        method: 'POST',
                        url: webhook,
                        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
                        data: JSON.stringify({ "Content": message }),
                        onload: function () {
                            console.log('[Sesame Driver] Step 15: Slack message sent with issue link');
                        },
                        onerror: function (error) {
                            console.error('[Sesame Driver] Step 15: Failed to send Slack message:', error);
                        }
                    });
                } else {
                    console.log('[Sesame Driver] Step 15: No webhook or issue URL, skipping Slack');
                }
                console.log('[Sesame Driver] Sequence complete. Closing window.');
                setTimeout(() => window.close(), 2000);
            })
            .catch(err => {
                console.error('[Sesame Driver] River auto-fill error:', err.message);
            });
    }

        // Handle dropdown change
        const issueSelect = modal.querySelector('#verificationIssue');
        const otherContainer = modal.querySelector('#otherReasonContainer');
        const confirmBtn = modal.querySelector('#verifyConfirm');
        const cancelBtn = modal.querySelector('#verifyCancel');

        issueSelect.onchange = () => {
            if (issueSelect.value === 'other') {
                otherContainer.style.display = 'block';

        // Hover effects
        confirmBtn.onmouseover = () => confirmBtn.style.background = '#218838';

            // Check autoSIM config (site-level overrides global)

                ? siteConfig.autoSIM === 'Y'

            showSuccessMessage(t('driverVerificationCompleted'));

        cancelBtn.onclick = () => {
            overlay.remove();
            restoreButton(); // Restore button on cancel too
        };

        // Close on overlay click
        overlay.onclick = (e) => {
            if (e.target === overlay) {
                overlay.remove();
                restoreButton(); // Restore button when closing via overlay
            }
        };
    }

    // Fetch driver information for initial verification (shows info match modal)
    async function fetchDriverInfoForVerification(vrid, buttonElement, instance) {
        console.log('[Sesame Driver] Fetching driver info for verification, VRID:', vrid);

        buttonElement.disabled = true;
        buttonElement.style.opacity = '0.6';

        // Store original button content
        const originalHTML = buttonElement.innerHTML;

        buttonElement.innerHTML = `
            <span class="css-147c4zy">
                <span aria-label="" role="img" aria-hidden="true" class="css-34iy07">
                    <svg aria-hidden="true" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16">
                        <path d="M8 0C3.6 0 0 3.6 0 8s3.6 8 8 8 8-3.6 8-8-3.6-8-8-8zm0 14c-3.3 0-6-2.7-6-6s2.7-6 6-6 6 2.7 6 6-2.7 6-6 6z" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.3"/>
                        <path d="M8 2c-3.3 0-6 2.7-6 6h2c0-2.2 1.8-4 4-4V2z" fill="currentColor">
                            <animateTransform attributeName="transform" type="rotate" from="0 8 8" to="360 8 8" dur="1s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
                        </path>
                    </svg>
                </span>
            </span>
            <span>Loading...</span>
        `;

        // Function to restore button
        const restoreButton = () => {
            buttonElement.disabled = false;
            buttonElement.style.opacity = '1';
            buttonElement.innerHTML = originalHTML;
        };

        try {
            const loadRes = await fetch(LOAD_API + vrid);
            const data = await loadRes.json();
            console.log('[Sesame Driver] Load API response:', data);

            // Check if there are multiple drivers in the load data
            const driversArray = data.drivers || [];
            console.log('[Sesame Driver] Number of drivers in load:', driversArray.length);

            if (driversArray.length === 0) {
                throw new Error('No drivers found in load');
            }

            const node = data.originNodeId || data.destinationNodeId || 'ANELU';

            const fetchDriverJson = async (driver) => {
                const driverId = driver.driverId || driver.transientDriverId;
                const driverUrl = `https://trans-logistics-eu.amazon.com/fmc/driver/detail/${node}/${driverId}/?transient=true`;
                console.log('[Sesame Driver] Fetching driver:', driverId);
                try {
                    const res = await fetch(driverUrl);
                    return await res.json();
                } catch (err) {
                    console.error('[Sesame Driver] Failed to fetch driver:', driverId, err);
                    return null;
                }
            };

            // Extract shipper account and carrier from load data
            const loadObj = data;

            let shipperAccount = 'N/A';
            if (loadObj.shipperAccounts && Array.isArray(loadObj.shipperAccounts) && loadObj.shipperAccounts.length > 0) {
                shipperAccount = loadObj.shipperAccounts[0];
            } else if (loadObj.shipperAccount) {
                shipperAccount = loadObj.shipperAccount;
            }

            const carrier = loadObj.carrier || 'N/A';

            console.log('[Sesame Driver] Extracted shipper account:', shipperAccount);
            console.log('[Sesame Driver] Extracted carrier:', carrier);

            // Fetch contract type from FMC search API
            const searchUrl = 'https://trans-logistics-eu.amazon.com/fmc/search/execution/by-id';
            const searchPayload = {
                searchIds: [vrid],
                searchByIds: true,
                page: 0,
                pageSize: 100
            };

            console.log('[Sesame Driver] Fetching contract type from FMC search API');

            let result;
            try {
                const searchRes = await fetch(searchUrl, {
                    method: 'POST',
                    headers: {
                        'Content-Type': 'application/json'
                    },
                    body: JSON.stringify(searchPayload)
                });
                const searchData = await searchRes.json();
                console.log('[Sesame Driver] FMC Search API response:', searchData);

                let contractTypes = 'N/A';
                if (searchData.returnedObject?.records?.[0]?.poContractTypes) {
                    const types = searchData.returnedObject.records[0].poContractTypes;
                    contractTypes = Array.isArray(types) ? types.join(', ') : types;
                }

                console.log('[Sesame Driver] Extracted contract type:', contractTypes);

                const driversData = (await Promise.all(driversArray.map(fetchDriverJson))).filter(d => d !== null);
                result = {
                    driversData,
                    shipperAccount,
                    carrier,
                    contractTypes
                };
            } catch (err) {
                console.log('[Sesame Driver] FMC Search API failed, continuing without contract type:', err);

                const driversData = (await Promise.all(driversArray.map(fetchDriverJson))).filter(d => d !== null);
                result = {
                    driversData,
                    shipperAccount,
                    carrier,
                    contractTypes: 'N/A'
                };
            }

            console.log('[Sesame Driver] All drivers data:', result.driversData);

            if (!result.driversData || result.driversData.length === 0) {
                throw new Error('No driver data');
            }

            // Collect all driver names
            const driverNames = result.driversData
                .map(driverData => driverData.returnedObject?.name)
                .filter(name => name);

            if (driverNames.length === 0) {
                throw new Error('No driver names found');
            }

            // Join names with " & "
            const driverName = driverNames.join(' & ');

            console.log('[Sesame Driver] Driver names:', driverNames);
            console.log('[Sesame Driver] Combined name:', driverName);

            // Try to find contract type in first driver object
            let contractTypes = result.contractTypes;
            const firstDriver = result.driversData[0].returnedObject;
            if (firstDriver.contractType) {
                contractTypes = firstDriver.contractType;
            } else if (firstDriver.contractTypes) {
                contractTypes = firstDriver.contractTypes;
            } else if (firstDriver.relayContractType) {
                contractTypes = firstDriver.relayContractType;
            } else if (firstDriver.contract) {
                contractTypes = firstDriver.contract;
            }

            // Search in the entire driver object for contract type
            if (contractTypes === 'N/A' || contractTypes === result.contractTypes) {
                const driverJsonStr = JSON.stringify(result.driversData[0]);
                if (driverJsonStr.includes('RELAY_FUTURE_CAPACITY')) {
                    const match = driverJsonStr.match(/"contractType[^"]*":\s*"([^"]*)"/);
                    if (match) {
                        contractTypes = match[1];
                        console.log('[Sesame Driver] Found contract type in driver JSON:', contractTypes);
                    }
                }
            }

            console.log('[Sesame Driver] Driver info for verification:', {
                name: driverName,
                shipperAccount: result.shipperAccount,
                contractTypes: contractTypes
            });

            // Check if we can auto-approve based on contract type or shipper account (from config)
            const autoApproveContractTypes = (SESAME_CONFIG && SESAME_CONFIG.autoApproveContractTypes) || [];
            const autoApproveShipperAccounts = (SESAME_CONFIG && SESAME_CONFIG.autoApproveShipperAccounts) || [];

            const isAutoApproveContract = autoApproveContractTypes.includes(contractTypes);
            const isAutoApproveShipper = autoApproveShipperAccounts.includes(result.shipperAccount);

            console.log('[Sesame Driver] Auto-approve check for verification - Contract:', isAutoApproveContract, 'Shipper:', isAutoApproveShipper);

            if (isAutoApproveContract || isAutoApproveShipper) {
                // Auto-approve: unlock directly without asking for verification
                console.log('[Sesame Driver] Auto-approved based on contract/shipper, skipping verification');
                restoreButton();
                unlockCheckIn(instance);
                showSuccessMessage(t('driverVerifiedAuto'));
            } else {
                // Need verification: show info match modal with driver information
                showInfoMatchModal(driverName, result.shipperAccount, contractTypes, vrid, result.carrier, instance, restoreButton);
            }
        } catch (err) {
            alert(`${t('noDriverAlert')} ${vrid}`);
            console.error('Driver fetch error:', err);
            restoreButton();
            unlockCheckIn(instance);
            showSuccessMessage(t('noDriverAssigned'));
        }
    }

    // Extract VRID from instance
    function extractVRID(instance) {
        console.log('[Sesame Driver] Extracting VRID from instance...');

        // Method 1: Try to find VRID in displayableLoadIdentifier
        const vridElement = instance.querySelector('[data-testid="displayableLoadIdentifier"] p[title^="VRID"]');
        if (vridElement) {
            const vridText = vridElement.textContent.trim();
            console.log('[Sesame Driver] Found VRID element with text:', vridText);
            // Match VRID with optional space: "VRID 112GF79L3" or "VRID112GF79L3"
            const match = vridText.match(/VRID\s*([A-Z0-9]+)/);
            if (match) {
                const vrid = match[1]; // Just the number, not 'VRID' + match[1]
                console.log('[Sesame Driver] Extracted VRID (method 1):', vrid);
                return vrid;
            }
        }

        // Method 2: Search all p elements with title starting with VRID
        const allVridElements = instance.querySelectorAll('p[title^="VRID"]');
        console.log('[Sesame Driver] Found p[title^="VRID"] elements:', allVridElements.length);
        if (allVridElements.length > 0) {
            const vridText = allVridElements[0].getAttribute('title') || allVridElements[0].textContent;
            console.log('[Sesame Driver] VRID text from title/content:', vridText);
            const match = vridText.match(/VRID\s*([A-Z0-9]+)/);
            if (match) {
                const vrid = match[1]; // Just the number
                console.log('[Sesame Driver] Extracted VRID (method 2):', vrid);
                return vrid;
            }
        }

        // Method 3: Search in all text content
        const allText = instance.textContent;
        console.log('[Sesame Driver] Searching in all text content (first 500 chars):', allText.substring(0, 500));
        const match = allText.match(/VRID\s*([A-Z0-9]+)/);
        if (match) {
            const vrid = match[1]; // Just the number
            console.log('[Sesame Driver] Extracted VRID (method 3):', vrid);
            return vrid;
        }

        // Method 4: Look for ISA instead
        const isaMatch = allText.match(/ISA\s*([A-Z0-9]+)/);
        if (isaMatch) {
            const isa = isaMatch[1]; // Just the number
            console.log('[Sesame Driver] Found ISA instead:', isa);
            return isa;
        }

        console.log('[Sesame Driver] No VRID/ISA found in instance');
        return null;
    }

    // Check if instance has a non-VRID load type
    function hasNonVridLoadType(instance) {
        const loadIdElements = instance.querySelectorAll('[data-testid="displayableLoadIdentifier"] p');
        console.log('[Sesame Driver] Checking for non-VRID load types, found elements:', loadIdElements.length);
        for (let elem of loadIdElements) {
            const text = elem.textContent.trim().toUpperCase();
            console.log('[Sesame Driver] Checking load ID text:', text);
            if (NON_VRID_TYPES.includes(text)) {
                console.log('[Sesame Driver] Found non-VRID load type:', text);
                return true;
            }
        }
        console.log('[Sesame Driver] No non-VRID load type found');
        return false;
    }

    // Create driver info buttons
    function createDriverButtons() {
        console.log('[Sesame Driver] Looking for instances...');
        const instances = document.querySelectorAll('.gate-operation-summary-new');
        console.log('[Sesame Driver] Found instances:', instances.length);

        instances.forEach((instance, index) => {
            console.log(`[Sesame Driver] Processing instance ${index}`);

            const footer = instance.querySelector('[data-testid="gateOperationSummaryFooter"]');
            if (!footer) {
                console.log(`[Sesame Driver] No footer found for instance ${index}`);
                return;
            }

            const buttonContainer = footer.querySelector('.css-ooy9n5');
            if (!buttonContainer) {
                console.log(`[Sesame Driver] No button container found for instance ${index}`);
                return;
            }

            // Check if this is a non-VRID load type (exception)
            const isNonVridType = hasNonVridLoadType(instance);
            console.log(`[Sesame Driver] Instance ${index} - isNonVridType:`, isNonVridType);

            if (isNonVridType) {
                console.log(`[Sesame Driver] Instance ${index} has non-VRID load type, skipping Check ID requirement`);
                // Show the check in button if it was hidden
                const checkInBtn = instance.querySelector('[data-testid="checkInButton"]');
                if (checkInBtn) {
                    console.log(`[Sesame Driver] Check in button state - hidden:`, checkInBtn.getAttribute('data-sesame-hidden'));
                    if (checkInBtn.getAttribute('data-sesame-hidden') === 'true') {
                        console.log(`[Sesame Driver] Showing check in button for non-VRID type`);
                        checkInBtn.style.display = '';
                        checkInBtn.setAttribute('data-sesame-hidden', 'false');
                        checkInBtn.setAttribute('data-sesame-unlocked', 'true');
                        checkInBtn.setAttribute('data-sesame-non-vrid', 'true'); // Mark as non-VRID exception
                    }
                }
                return; // Don't hide check in, don't add Check ID button
            } else {
                // If we have a VRID now, check if button was unlocked for non-VRID before
                const checkInBtn = instance.querySelector('[data-testid="checkInButton"]');
                if (checkInBtn) {
                    const wasNonVrid = checkInBtn.getAttribute('data-sesame-non-vrid');
                    console.log(`[Sesame Driver] Instance ${index} has VRID - was non-VRID before:`, wasNonVrid);
                    if (wasNonVrid === 'true') {
                        console.log(`[Sesame Driver] Switching from non-VRID to VRID, resetting button state`);
                        // Reset the unlocked state since we now have a VRID
                        checkInBtn.setAttribute('data-sesame-unlocked', 'false');
                        checkInBtn.setAttribute('data-sesame-non-vrid', 'false');
                        checkInBtn.setAttribute('data-sesame-blocked', 'false'); // Allow re-blocking
                    }
                }
            }

            // Block the Check in button FIRST
            blockCheckInButton(instance, index);

            // Check if button already exists
            const existingButton = buttonContainer.querySelector('[data-testid="sesameDriverButton"]');
            if (existingButton) {
                console.log(`[Sesame Driver] Button already exists for instance ${index}`);

                // Even if button exists, check if VRID has changed
                const vrid = extractVRID(instance);
                const checkInBtn = instance.querySelector('[data-testid="checkInButton"]');

                // If no VRID, remove the Check ID button
                if (!vrid) {
                    console.log(`[Sesame Driver] No VRID found, removing Check ID button`);
                    existingButton.remove();

                    // Also mark that VRID was removed
                    if (checkInBtn) {
                        const previousVrid = checkInBtn.getAttribute('data-sesame-vrid');
                        if (previousVrid) {
                            console.log(`[Sesame Driver] VRID was removed, marking as empty`);
                            checkInBtn.setAttribute('data-sesame-was-empty', 'true');
                        }
                    }
                    return;
                }

                if (checkInBtn) {
                    const previousVrid = checkInBtn.getAttribute('data-sesame-vrid');
                    const wasEmpty = checkInBtn.getAttribute('data-sesame-was-empty') === 'true';
                    console.log(`[Sesame Driver] Button exists - Previous VRID:`, previousVrid, 'Current VRID:', vrid, 'Was empty:', wasEmpty);

                    // Detect if VRID was added back after being empty
                    if (vrid && wasEmpty) {
                        console.log(`[Sesame Driver] VRID added back after being empty (${vrid}), resetting button state`);
                        checkInBtn.setAttribute('data-sesame-unlocked', 'false');
                        checkInBtn.setAttribute('data-sesame-hidden', 'false');
                        checkInBtn.setAttribute('data-sesame-vrid', vrid);
                        checkInBtn.setAttribute('data-sesame-was-empty', 'false');
                        // Re-hide the button
                        blockCheckInButton(instance, index);
                    }
                    // Detect if VRID changed to a different value
                    else if (vrid && previousVrid && previousVrid !== vrid) {
                        console.log(`[Sesame Driver] VRID changed from ${previousVrid} to ${vrid}, resetting button state`);
                        checkInBtn.setAttribute('data-sesame-unlocked', 'false');
                        checkInBtn.setAttribute('data-sesame-hidden', 'false');
                        checkInBtn.setAttribute('data-sesame-vrid', vrid);
                        checkInBtn.setAttribute('data-sesame-was-empty', 'false');
                        // Re-hide the button
                        blockCheckInButton(instance, index);
                    }
                    // First time setting VRID
                    else if (vrid && !previousVrid && !wasEmpty) {
                        checkInBtn.setAttribute('data-sesame-vrid', vrid);
                    }
                }
                return;
            }

            // Extract VRID
            const vrid = extractVRID(instance);
            console.log(`[Sesame Driver] VRID for instance ${index}:`, vrid);

            // Store VRID in check in button
            const checkInBtn = instance.querySelector('[data-testid="checkInButton"]');
            if (checkInBtn && vrid) {
                checkInBtn.setAttribute('data-sesame-vrid', vrid);
            }

            if (!vrid) {
                console.log(`[Sesame Driver] No VRID found for instance ${index}`);
                return;
            }

            // Create button
            console.log(`[Sesame Driver] Creating button for instance ${index} with VRID ${vrid}`);
            const driverBtn = document.createElement('button');
            driverBtn.setAttribute('data-testid', 'sesameDriverButton');
            driverBtn.setAttribute('title', `Check ID v${VERSION}`);
            driverBtn.className = 'css-1c9kgxj';

            // Check if Yard Pass button exists to adjust positioning
            const yardPassExists = buttonContainer.querySelector('[data-testid="yardPassButton"]');
            console.log(`[Sesame Driver] Yard Pass button exists:`, !!yardPassExists);
            const marginRight = yardPassExists ? '8px' : '8px';

            Object.assign(driverBtn.style, {
                backgroundColor: '#17a2b8',
                color: '#ffffff',
                marginRight: marginRight
            });

            driverBtn.innerHTML = `
                <span class="css-147c4zy">
                    <span aria-label="" role="img" aria-hidden="true" class="css-34iy07">
                        <svg aria-hidden="true" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16">
                            <path d="M8 8c1.7 0 3-1.3 3-3S9.7 2 8 2 5 3.3 5 5s1.3 3 3 3zm0 2c-2.7 0-8 1.3-8 4v2h16v-2c0-2.7-5.3-4-8-4z" fill="currentColor"/>
                        </svg>
                    </span>
                </span>
                <span>Check ID</span>
            `;

            driverBtn.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                e.stopPropagation();
                handleCheckID(vrid, driverBtn, instance);
            });

            // Insert button
            if (yardPassExists) {
                // Insert after Yard Pass button
                buttonContainer.insertBefore(driverBtn, yardPassExists.nextSibling);
                console.log(`[Sesame Driver] Button inserted after Yard Pass for instance ${index}`);
            } else {
                // Insert at the beginning
                buttonContainer.insertBefore(driverBtn, buttonContainer.firstChild);
                console.log(`[Sesame Driver] Button inserted at beginning for instance ${index}`);
            }
        });
    }

    // Block Check in button
    function blockCheckInButton(instance, index) {
        const checkInBtn = instance.querySelector('[data-testid="checkInButton"]');
        if (checkInBtn) {
            // Check if already hidden by us
            if (checkInBtn.getAttribute('data-sesame-hidden') === 'true') {
                return;
            }

            // Check if user has already unlocked it (don't re-hide)
            if (checkInBtn.getAttribute('data-sesame-unlocked') === 'true') {
                console.log(`[Sesame Driver] Check in button was unlocked by user, not re-hiding for instance ${index}`);
                return;
            }

            // Hide the button
            checkInBtn.style.display = 'none';
            checkInBtn.setAttribute('data-sesame-hidden', 'true');

            console.log(`[Sesame Driver] Check in button hidden for instance ${index}`);
        } else {
            console.log(`[Sesame Driver] Check in button not found for instance ${index}`);
        }
    }

    // Initialize
    function init() {
        console.log('[Sesame Driver] Script initialized');

        // Load config first
        loadConfig()
            .then(() => {
                console.log('[Sesame Driver] Config loaded, starting script');
                // Also load languages config in parallel
                return loadLanguagesConfig();
            })
            .then(() => {
                // If on River page, handle the auto-check action and stop here
                if (window.location.hostname.includes('river.amazon.com')) {
                    handleRiverPage();
                    return;
                }

                setTimeout(() => {
                    console.log('[Sesame Driver] Starting button creation after delay');
                    createDriverButtons();

                    // Observe DOM changes for new instances and check in buttons
                    const observer = new MutationObserver(() => {
                        createDriverButtons();

                        // Also check for check in buttons that might appear
                        const instances = document.querySelectorAll('.gate-operation-summary-new');
                        instances.forEach((instance, index) => {
                            blockCheckInButton(instance, index);
                        });
                    });

                    observer.observe(document.body, {
                        childList: true,
                        subtree: true
                    });
                    console.log('[Sesame Driver] Observer started');
                }, 1000);
            })
            .catch((error) => {
                console.error('[Sesame Driver] Failed to load config, script will not send Slack messages:', error);
                // Continue without config - script will work but won't send Slack messages
                SESAME_CONFIG = {};
                setTimeout(() => {
                    console.log('[Sesame Driver] Starting button creation after delay');
                    createDriverButtons();

                    // Observe DOM changes for new instances and check in buttons
                    const observer = new MutationObserver(() => {
                        createDriverButtons();

                        // Also check for check in buttons that might appear
                        const instances = document.querySelectorAll('.gate-operation-summary-new');
                        instances.forEach((instance, index) => {
                            blockCheckInButton(instance, index);
                        });
                    });

                    observer.observe(document.body, {
                        childList: true,
                        subtree: true
                    });
                    console.log('[Sesame Driver] Observer started');
                }, 1000);
            });
    }

    // Start when DOM is ready
    if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', init);
    } else {
        init();
    }
})();
"}
